sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19445" key="baru/mhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρύ-μηνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <sense id="n19445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρόσωπα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> </cit>(?) ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
